name: pantheon-ai/chezmoi
description:
Expert assistant for chezmoi dotfiles management. Use when: "add this file to chezmoi", "make this a template", "encrypt this secret", "apply on a new machine", "run script only once", "manage dotfiles across machines".

Examples:
- user: "Track my .zshrc with chezmoi" → chezmoi add ~/.zshrc
- user: "Make my .gitconfig machine-specific" → convert to .tmpl, use {{ .chezmoi.hostname }}
- user: "Run a script only on first apply" → once_ prefix
- user: "Sync to a new laptop" → chezmoi init --apply $GITHUB_USERNAME
- user: "Why isn't my file being applied?" → diagnose source attribute, diff, doctor
